channel.title: Zubehör für Tablets on Neueste Angebote

item.title: Brydge Pro 11.0 Wireless German QWERTZ Keyboard Compatible with iPad Pro 11-inch 1st Gen 2018 Bluetooth Wireless Keyboard with Backlit Keys
item.description: Es gibt ein Brydge Pro 11.0 Wireless German QWERTZ Keyboard Compatible with iPad Pro 11-inch 1st Gen 2018 Bluetooth Wireless Keyboard with Backlit Keys hier: ℹ️: RELIABLE PAIRING | Industry-leading 4.1 Bluetooth pairing for fast connectivity every time. With a battery life lasting up to 12-months on each charge and a USB-C cable to connect and charge your keyboard simultaneously, the Brydge Pro will have you working with confidence. TRAVEL FRIENDLY | Great for those on-the-go, the Brydge keyboard 11 iPad Pro features iOS special function keys, versatile viewing angles, tactile typing, and adjustable backlit keys.
